content: The youth in Malaysia really like Korean and Japanese celebrities.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by sestersparrow (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Ai giovani in Malesia piacciono davvero le celebrità coreane e giapponesi
zsm:Belia di Malaysia amat menggemari selebriti-selebriti Korea dan Jepun
